title: senecio scorzonerifolius
intro: Senecio scorzonerifolius, also known as the ragwort or buttercup ragwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio scorzonerifolius include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
